---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new skill, bundle improvement, or packaging enhancement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Proposal
What should be added or improved?

## Why it matters
What reusable value would this create?

## Target surface
- New skill
- Existing skill improvement
- Bundle-level docs
- Packaging / portability
- Community health / release process

## Suggested bundle
If known, where should it live?

## Verification idea
How would we know this addition is actually useful?
